data.content: Plan: replace separate agent-message type controls with a single dropdown multiselect in Agent History filters, and add workflow-step filters that expose queue/action state pairs. Update interaction-picker state derivation + label rendering, wire new filter data into agent-history view, and add/adjust tests for filter behavior. Risks: keeping existing URL/filter semantics and preserving current count badges. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
